title: The Tax ID object
excerpt: String representing the object’s type. Objects of the same type share the same value. Two-letter ISO code representing the country of the tax ID. Time at which the object was created. Measured in seconds since the Unix epoch. - `customer` (string, nullable, expandable (can be expanded into an object with the `expand` request parameter)) ID of the Account representing the customer. If the object exists in live mode, the value is `true`. If the object exists in test mode, the value is `false`.
